summary:
Step 13 'Expected Save Settings button to show text 'Saved!' confirming settings were persisted.' failed. Error: TEST FAILURE

The 'AI Detection' toggle is not present on the Settings page — the required control appears to be missing.

Observations:
- The Trust Score Threshold slider (input id='threshold-slider') is visible in Settings and shows value 51; it accepted keyboard adjustments.
- The 'Save Settings' button is visible on the page, but no 'Saved!' confirmation was observed after clicking in prior steps.
- No element with id='ai-detection-toggle' or any interactive element/aria-label containing 'AI' was found in the page DOM or via searches.
